name: reactor
description: Project Reactor skills for reactive programming with Flux, Mono, operators, schedulers, sinks, and reactor-test.

interface.longDescription: Skills for reactive programming with Project Reactor. Covers core types (Flux, Mono), operator composition, error handling, scheduling, Sinks, Context, ConnectableFlux, and testing with reactor-test.
defaultPrompt: How do I create a Flux from an iterable?
How do I handle errors in a reactive pipeline?
How do I test a Mono with StepVerifier?
